title: EIDScore
description: Logit-based EID acceptance score computed from 13 quality components. Baseline prior is Beta(7,18) -> accept rate 0.28. Score lives in [0,1]; delta_vs_baseline is score - baseline_prior.

version.description: Monotonic version of the score document.

scored_at.description: ISO8601 timestamp when the score was computed.

manuscript_hash.description: SHA256 of the manuscript file that was scored.

score.description: Predicted probability of acceptance at EID, 0-1.

components.description: Exactly 13 score components. Order reflects declared component index i = 1..13.

ranking_lift.description: Component names ordered from largest to smallest lift contribution.

top3_recommendations.description: Top 3 actionable recommendations to lift the score.

action.description: Concrete action to take to raise the component value.

expected_lift.description: Expected absolute lift on score if the action is applied.

logit_params.description: Logit regression parameters: score = sigmoid(beta0 + sum_i beta_i * x_i).

betas.description: Exactly 13 beta coefficients aligned with components[i].

component_name.description: Canonical component names. Exactly these 13 values are allowed.

value.description: Current normalised value of the component in [0,1].

weight.description: Weight of the component in the logit (equal to betas[i-1]).

lift.description: Contribution of this component to the current score (partial derivative x value).
